generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance IncubatorTempSensorInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer inside incubator (±0.5 °C accuracy, –10 °C to +85 °C, unique 64‑bit address)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTempDataTransmitted1
]

instance IncubatorTempSensorInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer inside incubator (second sensor, same specifications as sensor 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTempDataTransmitted2
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer mounted outside incubator for ambient room temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance IncubatorTempDataTransmitted1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorTempSensorInside1
]

instance IncubatorTempDataTransmitted2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorTempSensorInside2
]

instance AmbientTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTempSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance IncubatorTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature reading from inside incubator sensor 1 (°C)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IncubatorTempDataTransmitted1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ModelInferenceEngine, SciPyCalibrationEngine
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature reading from inside incubator sensor 2 (°C)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IncubatorTempDataTransmitted2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ModelInferenceEngine, SciPyCalibrationEngine
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient room temperature measurement (°C)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ModelInferenceEngine, SciPyCalibrationEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker running on the Raspberry Pi; transports sensor readings and controller state"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService,
                 ModelCalibrationService,
                 RealTimeMonitoringService,
                 SafetyViolationDetectionService,
                 HeatingOptimizationService
]

instance SciPyCalibrationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python SciPy optimisation module performing non‑linear least‑squares calibration of thermal model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance ModelInferenceEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine that runs calibrated Model A or Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService,
                 HeatingOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts future incubator temperature using calibrated Model A or Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureAlertInsight,
                 HeatingDecisionAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates model parameters (C_air, G_box, C_heater, G_heater) against experimental temperature trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationUpdateInsight,
                 ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors temperature readings and raises alerts when limits are crossed"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureAlertInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects safety or optimality violations (e.g., overheating) and triggers protective actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight,
                 ShutdownAction
]

instance HeatingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises heating and waiting durations to maintain set‑point temperature efficiently"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingDecisionAction,
                 WaitingDecisionAction,
                 OptimizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance TemperatureAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates alert when temperature exceeds predefined upper or lower limits"
]

instance CalibrationUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides updated calibrated model parameters to the controller"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates a safety violation such as temperature overshoot"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports optimal heating/waiting schedule based on current state"
]

// C17: Actions
instance HeatingDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decides to activate the heatbed for a heating period"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitingDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decides to pause heating (wait) until temperature approaches set‑point"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Writes calibrated parameters back to the controller for use in prediction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ShutdownAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Shuts down heatbed and fan to prevent overheating"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting components
instance SurfaceHeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Surface heatbed delivering up to 100 W, driven by MOSFET switch on custom PCB"
]

instance InternalFanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal circulation fan driven by MOSFET switch on custom PCB"
]

// C10: Models
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Single‑parameter energy‑balance thermal model of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelInferenceEngine
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four‑parameter thermal model (C_air, G_box, C_heater, G_heater) including heater thermal mass"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelInferenceEngine
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT publishes control commands (heat‑bed ON/OFF, fan ON/OFF, waiting durations) via RabbitMQ; the controller on the Raspberry Pi subscribes to these topics and drives the MOSFETs to actuate the heatbed and fan accordingly."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A CPS‑based DT architecture where the PT components connect to a Raspberry Pi controller; the controller interfaces with a RabbitMQ broker; DT components (model simulators, calibrators, monitors) subscribe to broker topics, forming a centralized orchestration around the Pi."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is examined through explicit assumptions (uniform temperature, negligible wall heat, constant air specific heat, ignored fan heat) and experimentally validated by uniformity tests (maximum temperature discrepancy ≤7 °C). Calibration minimizes residual error using a least‑squares cost function; model predictions are compared against measured temperature trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses the AMQP protocol implemented by RabbitMQ over TCP/IP; messages are exchanged between the Raspberry Pi controller and DT services via the local network (Wi‑Fi/Bluetooth)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT services (RabbitMQ broker, model simulators, calibrators) are deployed on‑premises on the same Raspberry Pi that runs the controller; the repository notes that RabbitMQ can also be deployed in the cloud if desired."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The low‑level driver incorporates a safe protocol that forces the PT into a predefined safe state on communication failures; the controller continuously monitors temperature limits to prevent unsafe heating, providing a safety layer for the DT‑controlled actuation."
]
